backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.8 to 3.3.0 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Rename the project artifact and name from BusinessLogicConsistencyModels to MicroservicesSimulator.
Upgrade gmavenplus-plugin to version 3.0.2 for better Groovy support.
Remove the explicit jacoco-maven-plugin configuration, likely relying on parent or other mechanisms.
Add a Maven profile for TCC (Two-Phase Commit) consistency model.
Add a Maven profile for Sagas consistency model.
Add H2 in-memory database dependency for testing purposes.
Upgrade Apache Groovy All to version 4.0.21.
Remove the explicit versioned H2 dependency block (replaced by managed version or different scope handling).
Refactor maven-compiler-plugin to use the java.version property instead of hardcoded values.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add a specific macOS metadata file to the gitignore to prevent it from being tracked in the repository.

README.md.general_idea: Renamed the project from 'Business Logic Consistency Models' to 'Microservices Simulator' to better reflect its purpose.
README.md.human_impl: # Business Logic Consistency Models -> # Microservices Simulator

README.md.general_idea: Updated the required Java version from 11+ to 17+ to align with the migration target.
Updated the required Maven version from 3.6.3 to 3.9.6.
Updated the required PostgreSQL version from 12 to 14.
Added a new section detailing how to run the application and tests using Docker Compose.
README.md.human_impl: ## Run Using Docker ... docker compose build ... docker compose up backend

README.md.general_idea: Changed the database name in setup instructions from 'blcmdb' to 'msdb' to match the new project name.
Added a troubleshooting tip for handling root-owned target directories after running Docker tests.
README.md.human_impl: * If you have run the unit-test using docker, `backend/target` directory may be with root owner and group, do: `sudo rm -rf backend/target`.

README.md.general_idea: Added specific instructions for running Spock tests using Maven with the test profile.
README.md.human_impl: ### Running Spock tests ... mvn clean -Ptest test

README.md.general_idea: Added a comprehensive guide on how to implement and test custom business logic using the simulator's architecture.
README.md.human_impl: ## How to implement and test your own business logic ... 1. Define Aggregate ... 9. Define Test Cases

README.md.general_idea: Added detailed steps to reproduce results from the DAIS2023 paper, including specific test cases and Docker commands.
README.md.human_impl: ## Spock Tests in [DAIS2023] ... ### Figure 3(a) ... docker-compose up test-fig3a

backend/jmeter/tournament/thesis-cases/5.general_idea: Update the JMeter test plan header to reflect the new JMeter version 5.6.2.
Reorder XML elements in LoopController to match the new JMeter schema or GUI default order.
Replace deprecated or removed HTTPSampler properties with new ones required by JMeter 5.6.2.
Add the new postBodyRaw boolean property to HTTPSamplerProxy elements to ensure compatibility with newer JMeter versions.
Add the delayedStart property to ThreadGroup elements to match the new JMeter schema.
Correct malformed URL paths by removing trailing slashes before query parameters to ensure valid HTTP requests.
Replace hardcoded timestamps with dynamic JMeter functions to prevent test failures due to expired dates.
Rename a test step to better reflect its actual functionality (adding a student rather than a course execution).
